sql.if:
AND
B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' M.USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' (B.BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR B.BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_CATEGORY_NO AS "boardCategory", BOARD_CATEGORY FROM BOARD_TYPE

SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, B.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS boardContent, B.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_NAME AS boardWriter, B.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, B.BOARD_DATE AS boardDate, B.BOARD_CD_NO AS boardCdNo FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.BOARD_DELETE = 'N'
SELECT * FROM BOARD_IMG WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND IMG_LEVEL = 'N'
mapper.delete: UPDATE BOARD_POST SET BOARD_DELETE = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
